confidence_flags: doc_page_start/end are inferred 1:1 from the printed sheet sequence A-01..A-27 (each row maps to exactly one document page); not separately printed as page numbers on this sheet itself

A-21 and A-22 are both printed as 'แบบขยายบันได ST.3' verbatim on this index — read as-is rather than assumed to be a typo; likely ST.3 spans 2 sheets (plan + section/details) the same way house #3's ST.2 spanned A-19/A-20, but not yet confirmed since those pages haven't been read in this pass
warnings: Sheet A-01 contains 3 distinct patterns side by side, inventoried first: this per-sheet architectural index (left column 'รายการแบบสถาปัตยกรรม (A)'), a material spec list (middle column 'รายการวัสดุ'), and a drawing-symbol legend (right column 'รายการสัญลักษณ์ประกอบแบบ'). Split into 3 sibling files: _หน้า03_index.json (this file), _หน้า03_material_list.json, _หน้า03_symbol_legend.json.

This house's A-01..A-27 index (27 sheets) maps exactly 1:1 onto source pages 03-29 (png03=A-01 doc_page1 ... png29=A-27 doc_page27), matching the task's assigned architecture page range exactly (2 more architecture sheets than house #3's 25-sheet A-01..A-25 set: this house has 3 bathroom detail sheets WC.1/WC.2/WC.3 vs house #3's 2, and 2 stair-detail sheets ST.3 vs house #3's single extra ST.2-details sheet).

This is a 2-story house (บ้านครอบครัวไทยร่วมสมัย 4): matches house #3's general 2-story sheet pattern (2 floor-plan sheets A-04/A-05, 4 elevations each on its own sheet A-07..A-10, 3 sections each on its own sheet A-11..A-13, a dedicated guardrail detail sheet A-23), but has 3 stair-detail sheets (A-19 ST.1, A-20 ST.2, A-21+A-22 ST.3) instead of house #3's 2 (A-18 ST.1, A-19+A-20 ST.2), and 3 WC sheets (A-16/A-17/A-18) instead of house #3's 2 (A-16/A-17 shared WC.1+WC.2 plan/section) — this house appears to have a 3rd bathroom and a 3rd stair not present in house #3.

Title block: 'แบบบ้านสานฝัน ของขวัญปีใหม่ คนไทยมีความสุข' / 'บ้านครอบครัวไทยร่วมสมัย 4', เลขที่แบบ AR 58004, วันที่ 19/10/59, sheet A-01 of 27 — this is the 4th sister design in the same government housing program as houses 1-3 (AR 58001/58002/58003).
